loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( partition by (member_group_no) order by tab.member_group_type ,tab.member_group_no ,tab.loan_type ,tab.membership_no ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id, (CASE lag(sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no,1,null)over( order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no) WHEN sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) as row_memno, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.seq_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_period, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.share_installment, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_period, ( select member_group_type_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_type where member_group_type = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ) as member_group_type_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type, (CASE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_balance WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_installment END) as emer_installment ,
sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ) as grp_con_name, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.norm_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.spec_intarr, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date , 'DD/MM/YYYY') as balance_tdate, sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.intarr_date, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id, sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_desc , sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_name ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_status_code ,sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.fund_amount
,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description
,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount
FROM sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_lon_m_contract WHERE ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_coop_control.control_id = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ) and ( ( sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.client_id = '000' ) ) and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_contract
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.balance_date = '31/03/2024' --and sc_rep_mem_share_loan_bal.emer_loantype = '25' /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในรายงานเด้อ*/ )tab
